summary: Frontend-only pass for iter40 refactor: (1) AI Companion → Wellness Assistant, (2) AI Prescription → Wellness Prescription, (3) Sound Bath default 10-min timer arming, (4) main Play/Pause halts bath scheduler, (5) Stop-all + same-preset-retap still work, (6) Free-tier Pro-lock regression. All 11 review-request checkpoints verified end-to-end on desktop 1920x1080 via Playwright against the preview URL. No bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor UX inconsistency (NOT a bug): after main Play/Pause stops an active bath, the timer widget shows duration*60 (e.g. '10:00') instead of '00:00' because timer-display renders `state.playing ? remaining : duration*60`. sound-bath-stop-all keeps state.playing=true (only bath.stop + setRemaining(0)) so it shows '00:00'. Internal remaining IS cleared to 0 in both paths; only the visual preview differs. Aligns with the existing transport-idle pattern (widget shows next-session preview when audio is stopped). Same-preset retap and stop-all both keep the engine running so they show 00:00. If the reviewer strictly wants play/pause to also read 00:00, either (a) make togglePlay skip the remaining reset (leave last remaining value) OR (b) tweak timer-display to `remaining || duration*60`. Not blocking — recommend leaving as is because '10:00' as the idle preview is consistent with the rest of the app.

Data-testid `ai-companion-button` on the header sparkle icon is a code-level string (not user-visible) but is now semantically stale after the rename to 'Wellness Assistant'. Consider renaming to `wellness-assistant-button` in a follow-up so tests read naturally. Non-blocking, but this test report continues to use the current selector.
/app/frontend/src/index.css:30 has a stale comment referencing 'AI Companion' — cosmetic only, not user-visible, safe to update in a follow-up.
verified_expectations: PRO admin: Wellness Assistant sheet auto-opens with heading 'WELLNESS ASSISTANT' and greeting 'Hello Admin, how are you feeling right now?' — no 'AI Companion' string in the DOM
PRO admin: right-column panel renders 'WELLNESS PRESCRIPTION' (uppercase via .label-tiny) — no 'AI Prescription' string in the DOM
PRO admin: header sparkle button title='Wellness Assistant', aria-label='Open Wellness Assistant'
PRO admin: after resetting Duration slider to 10, timer idle shows 10:00 and tapping sound-bath-preset-aurora_bath arms the countdown (observed 09:58 within 2s of tap, active badge visible)
PRO admin: Play/Pause button while bath active — active badge disappears within ~2s, audio engine stopped, internal remaining=0 (visual widget reverts to duration idle preview)
PRO admin: raising Duration slider to 30 → idle timer 30:00 → tapping sound-bath-preset-grounding_bath arms to 29:58 (bath scheduler picks up latest duration on start)
PRO admin: same-preset re-tap stops bath (badge gone) and clears timer to 00:00
PRO admin: sound-bath-stop-all button stops bath and clears timer to 00:00

PRO admin: Timer-expiry auto-stops bath — verified in code (Dashboard.jsx L186 calls getSoundBath(audioEngine).stop() inside the countdown effect's secsLeft<=0 branch); runtime not exercised due to 1-min minimum duration

FREE user (fresh register TEST_free_<ts>@example.com via /api/auth/register): Sound Bath panel Pro-locked — sound-bath-pro-badge + sound-bath-unlock-cta rendered, forced click on sound-bath-preset-aurora_bath does NOT activate a bath (no active badge)

FREE user: fresh account default Duration = 10 min, idle timer 10:00; Wellness Assistant sheet auto-opens with greeting 'Hello FreeTester, how are you feeling right now?'; right panel shows 'WELLNESS PRESCRIPTION' with lock
REGRESSION: no console errors during the flow beyond the pre-login 401 on /api/auth/me (expected pre-auth) and the standard restore-prefs GET after login
test_credentials: Admin: admin@example.com / JuzlUWlMMOjHM0u#m5qv0ds!oYp8 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Admin had persisted duration_minutes=5 from prior testing; reset back to 10 at end of run to leave admin state clean for next agent.
seed_data_creation: Registered ephemeral free user TEST_free_<epoch>@example.com via POST /api/auth/register (auto-logs in via httpOnly cookie). No sessions created. Cookie is scoped to browser session, so no cleanup required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin's persisted duration_minutes was 5 from iter39 — this run reset it back to 10 before logout so future default-duration checks won't be polluted. Wellness Assistant sheet still opens once per login session; close via [data-testid='ai-agent-close'] before hitting the SoundBathPanel. Sound Bath preset keys unchanged: crystal_bowl_bath, chime_meditation, gong_bath, full_ensemble, aurora_bath, grounding_bath, solfeggio_wash. Header sparkle button is still `data-testid='ai-companion-button'` (stale name, functional). If verifying timer-expiry auto-stop-bath at runtime, lower duration to 1 min and wait ~60s while a bath is active — the effect at Dashboard.jsx L177-207 is wall-clock-driven so a page-visibility background shouldn't distort it.
rca of the issue: n/a — refactor pass, no bugs found. The only observation is the play/pause-vs-stop-all timer visual asymmetry (10:00 vs 00:00) noted under critical_code_review_comments; both paths correctly halt the bath scheduler so the underlying requirement is met.
